adapters.name: ai-education-export
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $ai-education-export, /ai-education-export, or asks to export completed AI Education paper notes to the knowledge wiki. This is a legacy export-only compatibility workflow; prefer $paper-done for the complete pipeline.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to export a completed AI Education paper note to the personal knowledge wiki

adapters.name: idea-archive
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $idea-archive, /idea-archive, asks to run idea-archive, or asks to archive an idea with a reason. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to archive a research idea with a reason

adapters.name: idea-challenge
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $idea-challenge, /idea-challenge, or asks to stress-test a research idea. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to stress-test a research idea

adapters.name: idea-chat
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $idea-chat, /idea-chat, or asks for a bounded, source-grounded conversation about one research idea. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to discuss one research idea with bounded, source-grounded context

adapters.name: idea-develop
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $idea-develop, /idea-develop, asks to run idea-develop, or asks to deep-dive on an idea with cross-system context. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to deep-dive on an idea with cross-system context

adapters.name: idea-extract-from-source
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $idea-extract-from-source, /idea-extract-from-source, asks to run idea-extract-from-source, or asks to extract research ideas from an exported source note. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to extract research ideas from an exported source note

adapters.name: idea-help
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $idea-help, /idea-help, asks to run idea-help, or asks for a state-aware menu of available idea actions. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests for a state-aware menu of available idea actions

adapters.name: idea-new
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $idea-new, /idea-new, asks to run idea-new, or asks to capture a new research idea. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to capture a new research idea

adapters.name: idea-next
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $idea-next, /idea-next, asks to run idea-next, or asks to advance an idea to the next pipeline stage. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to advance an idea to its next pipeline stage

adapters.name: idea-retrospective
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $idea-retrospective, /idea-retrospective, asks to run idea-retrospective, or asks to generate a retrospective for an idea. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to generate a research-idea retrospective

adapters.name: idea-revise
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $idea-revise, /idea-revise, asks to revise an idea, or asks to rerun part of an idea workflow. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to revise an idea or rerun its current stage

adapters.name: idea-s2-decide
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $idea-s2-decide, /idea-s2-decide, or explicitly asks to record an S2 gate outcome. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to record an explicit S2 literature-gate outcome

adapters.name: idea-s2-full
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $idea-s2-full, /idea-s2-full, asks to start, resume, or check a Full S2 Literature Gate, or asks to run the stateful S2 literature-review workflow. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to start, resume, inspect, or check a Full S2 Literature Gate

adapters.name: idea-socratic
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $idea-socratic, /idea-socratic, or asks to refine a research idea through Socratic dialogue. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to refine an idea through Socratic dialogue

adapters.name: idea-status
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $idea-status, /idea-status, or asks for idea-pipeline status. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests for current idea-pipeline status

adapters.name: idea-zotero-add
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $idea-zotero-add, /idea-zotero-add, asks to run idea-zotero-add, or asks to add a paper to an idea's Zotero collection. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to add a paper to an idea's Zotero collection

adapters.name: interest-new
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $interest-new, /interest-new, or asks to add a rough current research interest through Socratic questioning before it becomes a formal idea. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to capture and refine a rough current research interest

adapters.name: interest-to-idea
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $interest-to-idea, /interest-to-idea, or asks to convert a current interest into a formal research idea. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to convert a current interest into a formal research idea

adapters.name: paper-done
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $paper-done, /paper-done, says a paper reading is complete, or asks to export notes and run the post-session paper pipeline. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language signals that a paper reading is complete and should enter the post-session pipeline

adapters.name: paper-reading-tutor
adapters.reason: Hand-maintained Codex-native tutor is semantically richer than any single Claude command.

adapters.name: paper-rough-done
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $paper-rough-done, /paper-rough-done, or says a paper was selectively read and should be archived as a rough-read record. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical lightweight post-paper workflow.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language signals that a selectively read paper should be archived as a rough-read record

adapters.name: project-init
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $project-init, /project-init, asks to run project-init, or asks to initialize tracking for a research project. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to initialize tracking for a research project

adapters.name: project-status
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $project-status, /project-status, asks to run project-status, or asks to discuss or inspect a tracked research project. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to discuss or inspect a tracked research project

adapters.name: project-sync
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $project-sync, /project-sync, asks to run project-sync, or asks to sync changes from a tracked research project. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to sync changes from a tracked research project

adapters.name: research-present
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $research-present, /research-present, asks to run research-present, or asks to design or build research presentation materials. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to design or build research presentation materials

adapters.name: record-reading-feedback
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $record-reading-feedback, /record-reading-feedback, finishes or skips a paper, or asks to record durable reading feedback. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language signals that a paper reached a terminal reading state and feedback should enter the recommendation loop

adapters.name: sync-reading-queue
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $sync-reading-queue, /sync-reading-queue, or asks to sync AI Education reading state with the paper tracker queue. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to synchronize the reading queue and terminal reading states

adapters.name: update-researcher-profile
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $update-researcher-profile, /update-researcher-profile, asks to run update-researcher-profile, or asks to sync the researcher profile from idea files. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to rebuild and sync the researcher profile from idea files

adapters.name: wiki-ingest
adapters.description: Use this skill when the user invokes $wiki-ingest, /wiki-ingest, or asks to ingest new source notes into the personal knowledge wiki. This is the Codex adapter for the canonical AI Research Tools Claude command.
adapters.natural_trigger: Natural language requests to ingest new source notes into the personal knowledge wiki
